title: Economic Policy Review
summary: This is a journal landing page for the New York Fed's Economic Policy Review, serving as an archive index listing research volumes from 1995-2017. No specific article content is provided; only volume/article titles and metadata are available. This is a navigation/listing page, not an archiveable source document.
key_points: The Economic Policy Review is a policy-oriented journal publishing macro, banking, and financial market research by NY Fed economists
Series editor is Julian di Giovanni; coeditors are Richard Crump and Marco Del Negro
Volume 23 (likely 2017) contains two issues: Number 2 (December) and Number 1 (February)
Listed articles include topics on inflation gauging, Government Securities Clearing Corporation, macroprudential policy exercises, and Treasury bill issuance
No publication date is provided for any specific article on this page
The page is a historical listing with volumes spanning 1995-2017
why_it_matters: This source provides no actionable content for research purposes. It is merely a navigation index to a historical journal archive. Individual articles (e.g., 'The Development of the Government Securities Clearing Corporation', 'The Effect of Regular and Predictable Issuance on Treasury Bill Financing') would be appropriate archive candidates if their full texts are available as separate documents.
